title: 11 herbal tinctures for new parents struggling with insomnia
description: Melissa officinalis tinctures, also known as lemon balm, have been used for centuries to help with insomnia. The properties and constituents of Melissa officinalis, including rosmarinic acid, apigenin, and linalool, have a calming effect on the nervous system. These compounds work by inhibiting the production of stress hormones, such as cortisol, and promoting the release of neurotransmitters like GABA, which helps to regulate sleep patterns.
